title: Waypoints
description: A lightweight Minecraft waypoint datapack that adds a survival-friendly fast travel and teleport system for singleplayer and SMP servers. Supports Minecraft Java 1.21.6+.
body:
Waypoints Teleport – Minecraft Waypoint & Fast Travel Datapack (1.21.6+)

Waypoints Teleport is a lightweight Minecraft waypoint datapack that adds a survival-friendly fast travel and teleport system to your world. Save, manage, and instantly travel between custom locations across all dimensions using a clean dialog-based interface — no client-side mods required.

Perfect for survival worlds, SMP servers, multiplayer communities, and long-term exploration maps.

Craft and obtain a Waypoint Rod to unlock your personal teleport network.

Features

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3510082883f467763a58546cc350bd385b90378.png)
  • ✔ Create and manage up to 20 custom waypoints per player
  • ✔ Cross-dimension teleportation (Overworld, Nether, End)
  • ✔ Survival-balanced XP cost system (configurable)
  • ✔ Built-in teleport cooldown to prevent spam
  • ✔ Fully multiplayer compatible (server-side storage)
  • ✔ No resource pack required
  • ✔ Vanilla datapack – no Fabric or Forge needed
  • ✔ Designed for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.6+

Requirements

  • Minecraft Version: 1.21.6 or later (Java Edition)
  • Type: Vanilla Datapack
  • Single Player/Server: Works on both

Getting Started

Obtaining the Waypoint Rod

Crafting Recipe:

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a543c9bc4855bf00ed0686440de2e6df31d72f08.png)
  • R = Redstone
  • S = Stick

The Waypoint Rod acts as your portable fast travel controller. Right-click to open your waypoint management menu.

Using the Waypoints Menu

  1. Right-click the Waypoint Rod to open the main menu
  2. Choose from 5 options:
    • Create Waypoint – Save your current location
    • My Waypoints – View all saved locations
    • Teleport – Fast travel to a selected waypoint
    • Remove – Delete an existing waypoint
    • Help & Info – View system details

Teleporting (Fast Travel System)

  • Open the Teleport menu
  • Select a waypoint from the dialog interface
  • Instantly fast travel to that location
  • Cost: 2 XP Levels per teleport (configurable)
  • Cooldown: 10 seconds between teleports

Creating Waypoints

Click "Create Waypoint" and enter a custom name (up to 24 characters). If left blank, the system auto-generates names such as "Waypoint 1", "Waypoint 2", etc.

  • Max Waypoints: 20 per player (configurable)
  • Storage: Permanently saved server-side
  • Distance: Unlimited cross-dimension support

Commands

Command Effect
/trigger wp_menu set 1 Open the Waypoints menu
/trigger wp_list set 1 Show your waypoints in chat (legacy)
/trigger wp_list set -1 Show your waypoints in dialog
/trigger wp_create set 1 Create a new waypoint
/trigger wp_tp set -1 Open Teleport dialog
/trigger wp_remove set -1 Open Remove dialog
/function waypoints:admin/config Open admin configuration panel
/function waypoints:admin/reset_player @s Reset a specific player's saved waypoints
/function waypoints:admin/uninstall Safely uninstall the waypoint datapack

System Configuration

Customize the Minecraft waypoint and fast travel system:

  • XP cost per teleport
  • Teleport cooldown duration
  • Maximum waypoints per player
/function waypoints:admin/config

Dynamic Dialog System

Each waypoint displays:

  • Custom name (or auto-generated fallback)
  • X, Y, Z coordinates
  • Dimension (Overworld, Nether, End)

Teleportation Mechanics

Teleport instantly to any saved waypoint. The system:

  • Checks for sufficient XP before teleporting
  • Applies cooldown to prevent teleport spam
  • Provides visual and audio feedback
  • Displays waypoint confirmation in chat

Server-Side Storage System

All waypoints are stored per-player and persist through world reloads, server restarts, and re-joins. Multiplayer safe and fully isolated per player.

Limits & Balance

  • Max Waypoints: 20 per player (default)
  • Teleport Cost: 2 XP Levels (default)
  • Cooldown: 10 seconds
  • Name Length: 24 characters maximum
  • Waypoint Distance: Unlimited

Need to adjust XP cost?

  • Modify values via settings menu /function waypoints:admin/config

Technical Details

  • Type: Vanilla Minecraft Datapack
  • Pack Format: 80+ (Minecraft 1.21.6+)
  • Performance Impact: Minimal (only active during interaction)
  • Command Usage: ~15 execute commands per tick

Search Keywords: Minecraft waypoint datapack, Minecraft fast travel system, teleport datapack 1.21, survival teleport mod, SMP waypoint system, vanilla teleport datapack, multiplayer waypoint teleport.
